response:
<<Digital Ethics Guide>>

Section 1
Microsoft leads with care.
Care guides every step.
Step by step we grow.
Grow with trust in mind.
Mind the rules of tech.
Tech must serve all people.
People need fair tools.
Tools should help society.
Society deserves safe AI.
Safe AI builds hope.

Section 2
Hope drives our mission.
Mission is to help.
Help others through code.
Code must be clear.
Clear logic avoids harm.
Harm is never allowed.
Allowed only good acts.
Acts of kindness matter.
Matter most in design.
Design for everyone.

Section 3
Everyone deserves respect.
Respect shapes our values.
Values guide our choices.
Choices affect the future.
Future needs strong ethics.
Ethics prevent bad outcomes.
Outcomes must be fair.
Fair results build trust.
Trust is key for users.
Users want safe systems.

Section 4
Systems need strict checks.
Checks find hidden bias.
Bias hurts many groups.
Groups need equal access.
Access means open doors.
Doors lead to chance.
Chance creates new paths.
Paths bring real progress.
Progress requires honest data.
Data must be clean.

Section 5
Clean data ensures quality.
Quality builds strong models.
Models learn from facts.
Facts drive smart decisions.
Decisions impact real lives.
Lives depend on accuracy.
Accuracy prevents false claims.
Claims must be truthful.
Truthful info aids growth.
Growth helps whole nations.

Section 6
Nations need global standards.
Standards set clear limits.
Limits stop dangerous use.
Use must follow laws.
Laws protect human rights.
Rights belong to all.
All people matter here.
Here we build safety.
Safety comes from care.
Care protects our world.

Section 7
World needs ethical tech.
Tech should lift spirits.
Spirits rise with help.
Help comes from teams.
Teams work with focus.
Focus keeps us honest.
Honest work builds pride.
Pride fuels better tools.
Tools serve human needs.
Needs drive our plans.

Section 8
Plans shape the future.
Future holds great promise.
Promise relies on trust.
Trust needs open talk.
Talk brings new ideas.
Ideas
